name: Hawaiian Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 Jars (48-oz) Great Northern Beans; rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Combine the beans, onion, sugar, ham, ketchup, pineapple, mustard and vinegar in a large bowl, mixing well. Divide the mixture evenly among four greased 13-by-9-by-2-inch baking pans. Cover tightly with foil. Bake for 1 1/2 hours. Remove foil and bake an additional 20 to 30 minutes.
Yield: 80 to 100 servings. Recipe from Taste of Home magazine.
